quotes.text: It is true that the Lord revealed to Moses that the priests of Aaron and Levi were to be men thirty years of age. This custom was followed in Israel down to the days of Paul. Therefore, it was in keeping with the law that Paul instructed Timothy that a deacon should have a wife, for a man thirty years of age holding the priesthood should be married. It was in harmony with this law given to Moses, that John the Baptist waited until he was thirty years of age before entering the ministry, and the same is true of the ministry of our Savior.
quotes.speaker: Joseph Fielding Smith
quotes.attr: Joseph Fielding Smith, Answers to Gospel Questions 2:10
